submitted_payload.name: Ralph Workflow
submitted_payload.description: Free and open-source AI coding workflow for developers who want plan-build-verify loops and reviewable unattended runs.

verification.execution_method: Direct POST to DevTool Center's public backend API discovered from the live submit page config.

why_this_action: Current audit says Codeberg adoption is flat and calls for fresh executable distribution lanes rather than more drafting.
A stale assumption said DevTool Center was already submitted, but there was no real execution log and backlink tracking still pointed at the wrong .com domain.
DevTool Center is developer-native, accepts a direct public submission, and lets us keep Codeberg as the primary destination.
expected_outcome: Qualified developers discover Ralph Workflow through a fresh developer-tools directory that links to the primary Codeberg repo.
replacement_condition: If the DevTool Center listing is not live by 2026-06-13, treat this lane as pending-only and switch the next fresh action to another untouched executable distribution surface.
